title: Improve conditional formatting settings
author: Blackhol3
body: Fix #2233 by allowing the `stopIfTrue` setting, and improve the TypeScript definitions and the associated part of the documentation.

comments.author: protobi-pieter
comments.body:
We've adopted this enhancement in our [@protobi/exceljs](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@protobi/exceljs) fork

* **Status**: Applied and tested successfully
*  **Version**: Included in 4.4.0-protobi.2
*  **Our issue**: https://github.com/protobi/exceljs/issues/26
*  **Our commit**: https://github.com/protobi/exceljs/commit/0509050

This adds excellent conditional formatting features:
-  stopIfTrue property for all rule types (expression, cellIs, top10, aboveAverage, containsText, timePeriod)
-  4 new cellIs operators: notEqual, greaterThanOrEqual, lessThanOrEqual, notBetween
-  Optional priority in TypeScript definitions
-  Added README documentation

We're tracking this and 12 other upstream PRs, and will sunset our fork once they're merged upstream.

Thank you for these valuable enhancements!
